authorship: Original vector compositions authored for The Relief Circuit Common Ship runtime. No external art, stock imagery, model weights, or third-party source files were incorporated.
license: Project-owned; distributed under the repository license for this runtime use.
releaseBoundary: This pack prepares the principal vessel environment, lead aquatic portrait, vessel cross-section, and direct operational symbol atlas. It does not claim Gate 6 is executable, assign Program 005, or bind any presentation before the exact accepted Gate 5 Arc bytes exist.

assets.responsiveIntent: cover crop preserves the common threshold table and at least four visibly incompatible habitat systems

assets.subject: Nima Quell, aquatic care worker
assets.responsiveIntent: portrait remains legible from mobile profile card to full decision-horizon panel
desktop shows the full systems relation; mobile uses a zoomable or scrollable authored map rather than dropping system labels

assets.surface: six watch tests, seven ship systems, and eight state tracks
assets.responsiveIntent: source atlas may be sliced into exact direct symbols; labels remain documentation rather than runtime law

required: every SVG has semantic title and description metadata
no asset contains embedded raster or remote dependencies
the cross-section names all seven ship systems
the symbol atlas covers exactly six watch tests, seven systems, and eight state tracks
no asset is imported by World before Gate 5 source authority is accepted
future Gate 6 browser acceptance proves responsive, forced-colors, reduced-motion, and keyboard behavior
